topWPAPlays.description: Zach Neto doubles (13) on a ground ball to left fielder Riley Greene. Sebastián Rivero scores. Donovan Walton to 3rd.
Wenceel Pérez homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field.
Matt Vierling grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Matt Vierling out at 1st.
Jo Adell doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Matt Vierling.
Vaughn Grissom doubles (7) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Matt Vierling. Mike Trout scores. Vaughn Grissom to 3rd.
Randal Grichuk doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Kody Clemens. Colson Montgomery scores. Chase Meidroth scores. Tristan Peters scores.
Tristan Peters singles on a ground ball to shortstop Tristan Gray. Munetaka Murakami scores. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.
Colson Montgomery singles on a ground ball to center fielder Ryan Kreidler. Miguel Vargas scores.
Rikuu Nishida reaches on a fielder's choice out, shortstop Tristan Gray to catcher Victor Caratini. Tristan Peters out at home.
Tristan Peters doubles (7) on a ground ball to right fielder Kody Clemens.
Caleb Durbin doubles (9) on a ground ball to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Isiah Kiner-Falefa scores. Caleb Durbin to 3rd.
Ronald Acuña Jr. hits a grand slam (3) to left center field. Jorge Mateo scores. Dominic Smith scores. Mike Yastrzemski scores.
Ozzie Albies doubles (9) on a line drive to left fielder Jarren Duran. Matt Olson to 3rd.
Jorge Mateo singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nick Sogard, deflected by pitcher Payton Tolle. Matt Olson scores. Ozzie Albies to 3rd.
Dominic Smith singles on a fly ball to left fielder Jarren Duran. Ozzie Albies scores. Jorge Mateo to 3rd.
Adley Rutschman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Yohendrick Piñango walks. George Springer scores. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Daulton Varsho to 2nd.
Kazuma Okamoto strikes out swinging.
Coby Mayo homers (6) on a fly ball to center field.
George Springer doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Catcher Brandon Valenzuela picks off Pete Alonso at 1st on throw to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr.
Ian Happ homers (12) on a fly ball to right center field. Alex Bregman scores.
Tyler Callihan doubles (1) on a fly ball to center fielder Pete Crow-Armstrong. Jhostynxon Garcia scores.
Seiya Suzuki singles on a line drive to left fielder Jhostynxon Garcia. Michael Busch scores. Ian Happ to 3rd.
Ian Happ singles on a ground ball to shortstop Jared Triolo. Michael Busch scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Jared Triolo.
Bryan Reynolds homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
Isaac Paredes homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Yordan Alvarez scores.
Jeremy Peña homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Josh Jung homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field.
Taylor Trammell doubles (3) on a ground ball to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Isaac Paredes scores.
Cam Smith singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Evan Carter. Taylor Trammell scores. Cam Smith to 2nd. Cam Smith advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by center fielder Evan Carter.
